---
title: "About me"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

# General Information
**Major:** Geology and ArcGIS   
- **Skills:** Python, R, SQL, ArcGIS, Machine Learning  
- **Experience:** Data science projects, tutoring, and teaching assistant work  
- **Interests:** Environmental data, geospatial analysis, predictive modeling  

## Goals
I am currently seeking internship opportunities in geology, analytics, or geospatial fields where I can apply my technical skills and continue developing professionally.

[MarkDown Basics](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#links-images)
